name: pickleball-for-two
description: Browser pickleball (Tennis for Two style) + planned Pro CPU behavior cloning

scripts.ml:build: node ml/sim/run_offline_sim.js && node ml/sim/run_benchmark_ladders.js && node ml/sim/regression_parity.mjs && python3 ml/oracle/generate_shot_oracle.py && python3 ml/oracle/export_shot_oracle.py && python3 ml/src/preprocess.py && python3 ml/src/train_behavior_clone.py --no-resume && python3 ml/src/eval_rollout_benchmark.py && python3 ml/src/check_acceptance.py && python3 ml/src/export_model.py && python3 ml/src/smoke_check_model.py && python3 ml/src/write_training_report.py && python3 ml/src/check_training_stop.py
